member.summary: Implementation for identity mapping and trust operations.

member.summary: Implementation for identity mapping and trust operations.

member.summary: Contract for resolving and managing identity mappings and trust state.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.IdentityProfile.Domain.Entities.IdentityMap
member.summary: Maps external identity (provider + subject) to an internal stable userId.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.IdentityProfile.Domain.Entities.UserTrust
member.summary: Stores trust metadata for a user.

member.summary: DI registration for the Identity Profile module.

member.summary: EF Core DbContext for the Identity Profile module.

member.summary: Design-time factory for creating IdentityProfileDbContext instances during EF migrations.

member.summary: Creates a new instance of IdentityProfileDbContext for design-time operations.
member.param: Command line arguments passed to the EF tools.
